description: May and Daisy reflect on Daisy’s contact with Sarge and the realization that Coulson’s memories exist within him. They discuss the nature of Sarge’s powers and agree, with uncertainty, that he may be key to fighting Izel. A mood of cautious optimism and emotional closure settles over them as they reaffirm the importance of supporting each other.

transcript.line: It's good that you finally got through to Sarge. We're gonna need him.
I'll admit, it was not the side that I expected. You want to say “I told you so?”
I don't fully understand it but he is in there. I-I... I didn't want it to be possible.
You needed to see it for yourself.
And now that you have, do you think he can control these powers of his?
I think Sarge's powers are very, very dangerous. But they might be just what we need.
He's looking for somewhere to belong. And all Coulson wanted... All Coulson wanted was for us to take care of each other. And I think if we do that for Sarge, that he'll do the same for us.
